name: SupplyMind Buyer Agent
description: Autonomous B2B buyer agent for office supplies. Discovers sellers via A2A agent cards, reads UCP catalogs, sends purchase tasks, and handles x402 micro-payment challenges for premium quotes.

capabilities.description: Sends purchase order tasks to seller agents
Handles HTTP 402 Payment Required challenges by simulating USDC micro-payments
Reads and parses UCP-compliant JSON-LD product catalogs

payment.note: Phase 4 activates real USDC spending via Circle Programmable Wallets with AP2 Mandate guardrails
